rows.label: tlk43200142_02_msg0001
rows.name:
Vandham said you could have
his Merc Group, but you're
still a beginner, you hear?

rows.label: tlk43200142_02_msg0002
rows.name:
If you've got a thorny job, send out a
Blade with field skills that match the
task! It'll get done much faster!

rows.label: tlk43200142_02_msg0003
rows.name:
Instead of sending Blades out
blindly, choosing the best Blade
is part of the job!

rows.label: tlk43200142_02_msg0005
rows.name:
He's been in a real foul mood
since Vandham passed on.
